creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-02-28 20:01:17 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    finance              Makefile 
  Added files:
    finance/openerp-server Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    finance/openerp-server/files patch-setup.py 
  Log:
  OpenERP is a complete ERP and CRM. The main features are accounting
  (analytic and financial), stock management, sales and purchases
  management, tasks automation, marketing campaigns, help desk, POS, etc.
  Technical features include a distributed server, flexible workflows, an
  object database, a dynamic GUI, customizable reports, and XML-RPC
  interfaces.
  
  WWW: http://www.openerp.com/
  
  PR:             ports/132159
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping<wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.69      +1 -0      ports/finance/Makefile
  1.1       +55 -0     ports/finance/openerp-server/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/finance/openerp-server/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/finance/openerp-server/files/patch-setup.py (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/finance/openerp-server/pkg-descr (new)
